prompt: Transform the floating platforms into fluffy clouds, adding whimsical weather elements like rainbows and occasional lightning bolts.
prompt_refined: Using image 1 as the source, transform the three wooden floating platforms (the one on the left supporting Donkey Kong, the one on the middle-right supporting Princess Daisy and Toad, and the long platform spanning the top) into fluffy, whimsical clouds. Additionally, introduce a vibrant rainbow arching across the background sky and a few subtle lightning bolts emanating from or near these newly formed cloud platforms.
objects: fluffy, whimsical cloud platform on the left (supporting Donkey Kong)
fluffy, whimsical cloud platform on the middle-right (supporting Princess Daisy and Toad)
long fluffy, whimsical cloud platform on the top
vibrant rainbow arching across the background sky
subtle lightning bolts emanating from or near the cloud platforms
